member.name: T:VigenerDecryptionTools.StringAnalyzer
member.summary: Uses an unsigned integer array of length 26 to hold the total number of occurrences for each letter. This can be used for frequency analysis

member.name: P:VigenerDecryptionTools.StringAnalyzer.TotalCharacters
member.summary: Returns the total number of characters analyzed

member.name: P:VigenerDecryptionTools.StringAnalyzer.HighestProbabilityCharacter
member.summary: Returns the character that has appeared the most in the analysis

member.name: P:VigenerDecryptionTools.StringAnalyzer.HighestProbability
member.summary: Returns the frequency of the most common character as a percentage

member.name: P:VigenerDecryptionTools.StringAnalyzer.LowestProbability
member.summary: Returns the frequency of the least common character as a percentage

member.name: M:VigenerDecryptionTools.StringAnalyzer.#ctor
member.summary: Default Constructor

member.name: M:VigenerDecryptionTools.StringAnalyzer.Analyze(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Char})
member.summary: Analyzes the input and tallies the total of each character
member.param: The input text to be analyzed

member.name: M:VigenerDecryptionTools.StringAnalyzer.Analyze(System.String)
member.summary: Wrapper for Analyze(IEnumerable)
member.param: The input text to be analyzed

member.name: M:VigenerDecryptionTools.StringAnalyzer.Clear
member.summary: Clears the counters for each character to reset the analyzer

member.name: T:VigenerDecryptionTools.Decrypter
member.summary: Holds the ciphertext input and can use frequency analysis to determine the encryption key and decrypt

member.name: M:VigenerDecryptionTools.Decrypter.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Default constructor that takes the cipher text string as input

member.name: M:VigenerDecryptionTools.Decrypter.DecryptSingleKey(System.String,System.Char)
member.summary: Iterates through each character in the provided cipher text and decrypts it using the given key
member.param: The key to be used for decryption

member.name: M:VigenerDecryptionTools.Decrypter.DecryptSingleChar(System.Char,System.Char)
member.summary: Decrypts one character with the given key using a caesar shift cipher

member.name: M:VigenerDecryptionTools.Decrypter.SeparateStrings(System.Int32)
member.summary: Separates strings for encryption by each character of the key
member.returns: The separated strings to decrypt using a single character key

member.name: M:VigenerDecryptionTools.Decrypter.FindKeyLength
member.summary: Performs a frequency analysis testing multiple different key lengths to determine the most probable key length
member.returns: The key length or 0 if not found

member.name: M:VigenerDecryptionTools.Decrypter.FindKey(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Finds the key by determining the distance between 'E' and the most frequent letter analyzed to discover each character of the key at a time
member.returns: Each character of the key as it's discovered

member.name: M:VigenerDecryptionTools.Decrypter.FindEncryptionKey
member.summary: Finds and returns the key used for encrypting the ciphertext as a string

member.name: M:VigenerDecryptionTools.Decrypter.Decrypt(System.String)
member.summary: Decrypts the ciphertext using the given key

member.name: M:VigenerDecryptionTools.Decrypter.Decrypt
member.summary: A wrapper for Decrypt(string) that does not require you to input the key

member.name: M:VigenerDecryptionTools.Program.Main(System.String[])
member.summary: Automatically runs the decryption program and writes the data to an output file
